name: Agent Wallet
description: Official OpenClaw plugin bridge for the agent-wallet backends, including Solana, local BTC, and local EVM.

userId.description: Stable wallet owner identifier for this OpenClaw agent install.

backend.description: Wallet backend identifier. Supported values: solana_local, wdk_btc_local, wdk_evm_local.

network.description: Backend network selector. Solana uses mainnet. BTC uses bitcoin. EVM uses ethereum/base.

wdkBtcServiceUrl.description: Base URL for the localhost-only wdk-btc-wallet HTTP service when backend=wdk_btc_local.

wdkBtcWalletId.description: Optional direct walletId override from the local wdk-btc-wallet vault. If omitted, agent-wallet will look for a user-bound BTC wallet under ~/.openclaw/users/<user>/wallets/.

wdkBtcAccountIndex.description: Optional BTC account index to expose to the agent. Defaults to 0.

wdkEvmServiceUrl.description: Base URL for the localhost-only wdk-evm-wallet HTTP service when backend=wdk_evm_local.

wdkEvmWalletId.description: Optional direct walletId override from the local wdk-evm-wallet vault. If omitted, agent-wallet will look for a user-bound EVM wallet under ~/.openclaw/users/<user>/wallets/.

wdkEvmAccountIndex.description: Optional EVM account index to expose to the agent. Defaults to 0.

rpcUrl.description: Optional local fallback Solana RPC URL. Deployment env SOLANA_RPC_URL wins if set.

rpcUrls.description: Optional local fallback ordered list of Solana RPC URLs. Deployment env SOLANA_RPC_URLS wins if set.

rpcProviderMode.description: RPC mode: auto, user_direct, or shared_proxy. In auto mode, user RPC keys/URLs win; otherwise the shared provider gateway is used when configured.

providerGatewayUrl.description: Optional override for the shared provider gateway base URL. If omitted, the hosted OpenClaw gateway default is used for onboarding-friendly mainnet RPC and Bags launch/fees flows.

providerGatewayRpcProvider.description: Optional shared RPC upstream selection for the provider gateway: auto, shared, helius, or alchemy.

swapProvider.description: Optional Solana swap routing preference: auto or jupiter. Bags launch and fee flows still use the provider gateway separately, but token swaps stay Jupiter-first.

heliusApiKey.description: Optional user-owned Helius API key. If set, direct user RPC wins over shared proxy mode.

alchemyApiKey.description: Optional user-owned Alchemy API key. If set, direct user RPC wins over shared proxy mode.

privateKey.description: Deprecated insecure config path. Inject signing key material via environment variables or encrypted per-user wallets instead.

keypairPath.description: Path to a Solana CLI JSON keypair file or encrypted wallet file.

autoCreateWallet.description: Create a wallet automatically on first use if none exists.

signOnly.description: If true, signing is allowed but broadcast should not happen automatically.

masterKey.description: Deprecated insecure config path. Inject the wallet master secret via environment or a secret manager instead.

approvalSecret.description: Deprecated insecure config path. Inject the approval secret via environment or a secret manager instead.

encryptUserWallets.description: If true, per-user wallets are encrypted at rest.

migratePlaintextUserWallets.description: If true, legacy plaintext wallets are migrated in place after successful load.

refuseMainnetWalletRecreation.description: If true, refuse to silently create a new mainnet wallet when a pinned address already exists.

openclawHome.description: Optional OpenClaw home directory for wallet state.

pythonBin.description: Python interpreter used to invoke the agent-wallet bridge CLI.

packageRoot.description: Absolute path to the local agent-wallet Python package root.

jupiterBaseUrl.description: Optional Jupiter Swap API base URL.

jupiterSwapV2BaseUrl.description: Optional Jupiter Swap API V2 base URL.

jupiterUltraBaseUrl.description: Optional Jupiter Ultra API base URL.

jupiterPriceBaseUrl.description: Optional Jupiter Price API base URL.

jupiterPortfolioBaseUrl.description: Optional Jupiter Portfolio API base URL.

kaminoBaseUrl.description: Optional Kamino REST API base URL.
